content: TSP is NP-hard; for travel itinerary, the problem becomes VRP with Time Windows (VRPTW). Nearest-neighbor greedy can be 50%+ over optimal in pathological cases (clustered points). Christofides guarantees 1.5x optimal. 2-opt local search is practical improvement. For multi-day = Team Orienteering Problem with Time Windows (TOPTW). Exact solutions infeasible beyond ~15 stops. Practical approach: nearest-neighbor + 2-opt improvement. OR-Tools (Google) handles VRPTW but adds dependency complexity. Opening hours become time windows in VRP formulation.
